indicators.name: large L-shaped desk
indicators.rationale: The desk occupies a significant portion of the floor space, leaving little room for a yoga mat or other stretching equipment.

indicators.name: filing cabinet
indicators.rationale: The filing cabinet is placed against the wall, taking up valuable floor space and making it difficult to create an open area for yoga.

indicators.name: stacked boxes and papers
indicators.rationale: The floor is cluttered with boxes and papers, obstructing any potential space for yoga or stretching.

indicators.name: no open floor area
indicators.rationale: There is no unobstructed floor space available for yoga or stretching activities.

indicators.name: high visual noise from clutter
indicators.rationale: The dense visual clutter makes it difficult to focus on a yoga practice and can be distracting.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is poorly suited for yoga or stretching due to the large L-shaped desk, cluttered floor, and lack of open floor space. The presence of furniture and clutter obstructs any potential space for yoga or stretching, resulting in a low score of 2.
